prd: Integrate the EvalScore quality rubric (src/core/economy/eval-rubric.ts) into the llm-call-ledger persistence: when a call is recorded, optionally accept an EvalScore and persist it as a JSON field `eval_score` in the llm_call_ledger table. AC: recordModelCall accepts optional evalScore; field is null when not provided; summarizeLedger includes avgQualityScore in summary.
